case_title: VLADIMIR BELIAEV VS. EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,718.00 FILED BY BELIAEV, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-08-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-21-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELIAEV, VLADIMIR AS TO ASSIGNEE ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS

AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY AND ORDER GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, IT IS SO ORDERED THAT THE TERM JUDGMENT DEBTOR INCLUDE THE NAMES EMOTIV INC. AND EMOTIVE LIFESCIENCES, INC. FILED BY ASSIGNEE ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BELIAEV, VLADIMIR
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY BELIAEV, VLADIMIR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT., "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL". FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELIAEV, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:79.50) SERVED APR-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COURT ACCEPTS PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $133.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $200.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELIAEV, VLADIMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMOTIV SYSTEMS, INC AKA EMOTIVE, INC. AND AKA EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC. $2,718.00 PRINCIPAL, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,851.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
